name: actionforge
description: Turn vague ideas into executable plans. Supports dev, product, startup, debug, AI, and Jira modes.
tagline: Turn vague ideas into executable plans.

modes.name: dev
modes.description: Architecture, files, implementation steps, edge cases

modes.name: product
modes.description: User stories, acceptance criteria, prioritization, success metrics

modes.name: startup
modes.description: Market, MVP scope, validation, monetization, first customers

modes.name: ai
modes.description: Model role, prompt architecture, evaluation, failure modes

modes.name: jira
modes.description: Jira-ready issues with all fields, acceptance criteria, sub-tasks
